summary: Tested Import from Organization feature - all backend endpoints working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with all 19 table checkboxes, Select All/Deselect All, source org dropdown, date filters, Preview and Execute Import buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend import_org.py: Well-structured with proper super-admin access control, 19 importable tables defined, duplicate checking via DUP_CHECK dict, auto-creation of missing accounts for transactional tables
Frontend ImportOrgPage.jsx: Clean implementation with proper data-testid attributes for testing, uses AuthContext for organizations list, proper error handling with toast notifications
Route /import-org correctly added to App.js with ProtectedRoute wrapper
Sidebar item 'Import from Org' correctly added with requiresSuperAdmin flag in Layout.jsx

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed, 3 skipped due to no non-super-admin users)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing organizations (Matar Est, Michel Mattar Trading Est.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Import from Organization feature fully tested. Two organizations exist in preview: 'Matar Est' (current) and 'Michel Mattar Trading Est.' (source). Preview shows 4348 accounts available for import from Michel Mattar Trading Est. All 19 tables are correctly listed with date-based tables marked with asterisk.

GET /api/import-org/tables.details: Returns exactly 19 tables with correct structure (key, label, has_date)

POST /api/import-org/preview.details: Returns source_org name and counts for selected tables

POST /api/import-org/execute.details: Returns proper results structure with imported/skipped counts, auto_created_accounts

super_admin_access_control.details: Endpoints return 403 when accessed without auth

same_org_validation.details: Execute returns 400 when source_org_id equals target_org_id

invalid_org_handling.details: Returns 404 for invalid source org ID

frontend_page_renders.details: Page renders at /import-org with all 19 table checkboxes

source_org_dropdown.details: Shows organizations excluding current org (Michel Mattar Trading Est.)

select_all_deselect_all.details: Both buttons work correctly - Select All checks all 19, Deselect All unchecks all

date_filter_inputs.details: From Date and To Date inputs present and functional

sidebar_navigation.details: Import from Org menu item visible for super_admin users
